title: Place and Movement Combinations
description: Practice two place or movement prepositional phrases in each sentence.

questions.sentence: The café is ___ the station ___ a bookstore.
questions.completedSentence: The café is near the station beside a bookstore.
questions.japanese: そのカフェは駅の近くで、本屋の隣にある。

questions.sentence: The ball rolled ___ the table ___ two chairs.
questions.completedSentence: The ball rolled under the table between two chairs.
questions.japanese: ボールはテーブルの下で二脚の椅子の間に転がった。

questions.sentence: We walked ___ the river ___ the park.
questions.completedSentence: We walked along the river across the park.
questions.japanese: 川に沿って歩き、公園を横切った。

questions.sentence: The plane flew ___ the clouds ___ the ocean.
questions.completedSentence: The plane flew above the clouds across the ocean.
questions.japanese: 飛行機は雲の上を飛び、海を横断した。

questions.sentence: She put the bag ___ the desk ___ the chair.
questions.completedSentence: She put the bag under the desk behind the chair.
questions.japanese: 彼女はかばんを机の下で椅子の後ろに置いた。

questions.sentence: The dog ran ___ the garden ___ the house.
questions.completedSentence: The dog ran into the garden behind the house.
questions.japanese: 犬は家の後ろにある庭へ走り込んだ。

questions.sentence: A bridge stretches ___ the river ___ the village.
questions.completedSentence: A bridge stretches across the river near the village.
questions.japanese: 村の近くで橋が川を横切って架かっている。

questions.sentence: The note is ___ the picture ___ the chart.
questions.completedSentence: The note is below the picture beside the chart.
questions.japanese: その注は写真の下で図の隣にある。

questions.sentence: The bicycle is ___ the cars ___ the tree.
questions.completedSentence: The bicycle is between the cars under the tree.
questions.japanese: 自転車は木の下で二台の車の間にある。

questions.sentence: The road runs ___ the coast ___ the cliffs.
questions.completedSentence: The road runs along the coast below the cliffs.
questions.japanese: 道路は崖の下を海岸に沿って続いている。

questions.sentence: We sat ___ the window ___ the door.
questions.completedSentence: We sat near the window beside the door.
questions.japanese: 窓の近くでドアの隣に座った。

questions.sentence: He walked ___ the field ___ the forest.
questions.completedSentence: He walked across the field into the forest.
questions.japanese: 彼は野原を横切って森の中へ歩いた。

questions.sentence: The clock hangs ___ the shelf ___ the counter.
questions.completedSentence: The clock hangs above the shelf behind the counter.
questions.japanese: 時計はカウンターの後ろにある棚の上に掛かっている。

questions.sentence: Two lamps hang ___ the desk and ___ the sofa.
questions.completedSentence: Two lamps hang above the desk and above the sofa.
questions.japanese: 二つのランプが机の上とソファーの上に掛かっている。

questions.sentence: The cat hid ___ the bed ___ the wall.
questions.completedSentence: The cat hid under the bed near the wall.
questions.japanese: 猫は壁の近くにあるベッドの下に隠れた。

questions.sentence: The path goes ___ the lake ___ the bridge.
questions.completedSentence: The path goes along the lake under the bridge.
questions.japanese: その道は湖に沿って橋の下を通っている。

questions.sentence: The restaurant is ___ the bank and the post office ___ the hotel.
questions.completedSentence: The restaurant is between the bank and the post office near the hotel.
questions.japanese: そのレストランはホテルの近くで銀行と郵便局の間にある。

questions.sentence: We crossed ___ the street ___ the station.
questions.completedSentence: We crossed across the street near the station.
questions.japanese: 駅の近くで通りを横切った。

questions.sentence: The bird flew ___ the trees ___ the garden.
questions.completedSentence: The bird flew above the trees into the garden.
questions.japanese: 鳥は木々の上を飛び、庭へ入った。

questions.sentence: His shoes are ___ the bench ___ the door.
questions.completedSentence: His shoes are under the bench beside the door.
questions.japanese: 彼の靴はドアの隣にあるベンチの下にある。

questions.sentence: The bus stopped ___ the school and the gym ___ the library.
questions.completedSentence: The bus stopped between the school and the gym behind the library.
questions.japanese: バスは図書館の後ろで学校と体育館の間に止まった。

questions.sentence: A tunnel runs ___ the hill ___ the village.
questions.completedSentence: A tunnel runs under the hill near the village.
questions.japanese: 村の近くでトンネルが丘の下を通っている。

questions.sentence: The painting hangs ___ the sofa ___ the window.
questions.completedSentence: The painting hangs above the sofa beside the window.
questions.japanese: 絵は窓の隣でソファーの上に掛かっている。

questions.sentence: She walked ___ the hallway ___ the classroom.
questions.completedSentence: She walked along the hallway into the classroom.
questions.japanese: 彼女は廊下を進み、教室の中へ入った。

questions.sentence: The river flows ___ the bridge ___ the road.
questions.completedSentence: The river flows under the bridge behind the road.
questions.japanese: 川は道路の後ろにある橋の下を流れている。

questions.sentence: The parking lot is ___ the buildings ___ the station.
questions.completedSentence: The parking lot is between the buildings near the station.
questions.japanese: 駐車場は駅の近くで二つの建物の間にある。

questions.sentence: We cycled ___ the beach ___ the town.
questions.completedSentence: We cycled along the beach across the town.
questions.japanese: 海岸に沿って自転車で走り、町を横切った。

questions.sentence: The kite rose ___ the houses ___ the clouds.
questions.completedSentence: The kite rose above the houses below the clouds.
questions.japanese: たこは家々の上、雲の下まで上がった。

questions.sentence: The child stood ___ his parents ___ the stage.
questions.completedSentence: The child stood between his parents near the stage.
questions.japanese: その子どもは舞台の近くで両親の間に立っていた。

questions.sentence: The cat ran ___ the table and ___ the sofa.
questions.completedSentence: The cat ran under the table and under the sofa.
questions.japanese: 猫はテーブルの下とソファーの下を走った。

questions.sentence: The hotel stands ___ the river ___ the museum.
questions.completedSentence: The hotel stands near the river behind the museum.
questions.japanese: そのホテルは川の近くで博物館の後ろに建っている。

questions.sentence: We walked ___ the square ___ the café.
questions.completedSentence: We walked across the square into the café.
questions.japanese: 広場を横切ってカフェの中へ入った。

questions.sentence: The sign is ___ the door ___ the clock.
questions.completedSentence: The sign is above the door below the clock.
questions.japanese: 標識はドアの上で時計の下にある。

questions.sentence: The dog slept ___ the chair ___ its owner.
questions.completedSentence: The dog slept under the chair beside its owner.
questions.japanese: 犬は飼い主の隣にある椅子の下で眠った。

questions.sentence: The road continues ___ the valley ___ the mountains.
questions.completedSentence: The road continues along the valley between the mountains.
questions.japanese: 道路は山々の間にある谷に沿って続いている。

questions.sentence: A path leads ___ the park ___ the library.
questions.completedSentence: A path leads into the park behind the library.
questions.japanese: その道は図書館の後ろにある公園へ入っていく。

questions.sentence: The boat moved ___ the bridge ___ the island.
questions.completedSentence: The boat moved under the bridge near the island.
questions.japanese: 船は島の近くにある橋の下を進んだ。

questions.sentence: She sat ___ Ken and Aya ___ the window.
questions.completedSentence: She sat between Ken and Aya near the window.
questions.japanese: 彼女は窓の近くでケンとアヤの間に座った。

questions.sentence: The plane passed ___ the city ___ the clouds.
questions.completedSentence: The plane passed above the city below the clouds.
questions.japanese: 飛行機は町の上、雲の下を通過した。

questions.sentence: We walked ___ the bridge ___ the riverbank.
questions.completedSentence: We walked across the bridge along the riverbank.
questions.japanese: 橋を渡り、川岸に沿って歩いた。

questions.sentence: The box is ___ the shelf ___ the desk.
questions.completedSentence: The box is below the shelf beside the desk.
questions.japanese: 箱は棚の下で机の隣にある。

questions.sentence: He parked ___ the building ___ a tree.
questions.completedSentence: He parked behind the building under a tree.
questions.japanese: 彼は建物の後ろにある木の下に駐車した。

questions.sentence: The train entered ___ the tunnel ___ the hill.
questions.completedSentence: The train entered into the tunnel under the hill.
questions.japanese: 列車は丘の下にあるトンネルへ入った。

questions.sentence: A fence runs ___ the field ___ the road.
questions.completedSentence: A fence runs along the field beside the road.
questions.japanese: 柵は道路の隣で野原に沿って続いている。

questions.sentence: The café is ___ the bookstore and the bank ___ the station.
questions.completedSentence: The café is between the bookstore and the bank near the station.
questions.japanese: そのカフェは駅の近くで本屋と銀行の間にある。

questions.sentence: The children ran ___ the playground ___ the gym.
questions.completedSentence: The children ran across the playground into the gym.
questions.japanese: 子どもたちは運動場を横切って体育館へ入った。

questions.sentence: The house is ___ the school ___ the river.
questions.completedSentence: The house is behind the school near the river.
questions.japanese: その家は川の近くで学校の後ろにある。

questions.sentence: The picture hangs ___ the desk ___ the calendar.
questions.completedSentence: The picture hangs above the desk beside the calendar.
questions.japanese: その写真はカレンダーの隣で机の上に掛かっている。

questions.sentence: We walked ___ the trail ___ the trees.
questions.completedSentence: We walked along the trail between the trees.
questions.japanese: 木々の間にある小道に沿って歩いた。

questions.sentence: The cat jumped ___ the box ___ the table.
questions.completedSentence: The cat jumped into the box under the table.
questions.japanese: 猫はテーブルの下にある箱へ飛び込んだ。

questions.sentence: The bus passed ___ the bridge ___ the station.
questions.completedSentence: The bus passed under the bridge near the station.
questions.japanese: バスは駅の近くにある橋の下を通った。

questions.sentence: The shop is ___ the two cafés ___ the hotel.
questions.completedSentence: The shop is between the two cafés beside the hotel.
questions.japanese: その店はホテルの隣で二軒のカフェの間にある。

questions.sentence: Clouds floated ___ the mountain ___ the plane.
questions.completedSentence: Clouds floated above the mountain below the plane.
questions.japanese: 雲は山の上、飛行機の下に浮かんでいた。

questions.sentence: He stood ___ the curtain ___ the door.
questions.completedSentence: He stood behind the curtain beside the door.
questions.japanese: 彼はドアの隣にあるカーテンの後ろに立っていた。

questions.sentence: The road goes ___ the town ___ the coast.
questions.completedSentence: The road goes across the town along the coast.
questions.japanese: 道路は町を横切り、海岸に沿って続いている。

questions.sentence: Put the suitcase ___ the bed ___ the wall.
questions.completedSentence: Put the suitcase under the bed near the wall.
questions.japanese: スーツケースを壁の近くにあるベッドの下に置くこと。

questions.sentence: The cyclist rode ___ the bridge ___ the park.
questions.completedSentence: The cyclist rode across the bridge into the park.
questions.japanese: 自転車の人は橋を渡って公園へ入った。

questions.sentence: A balcony is ___ the entrance ___ the sign.
questions.completedSentence: A balcony is above the entrance below the sign.
questions.japanese: バルコニーは入口の上で標識の下にある。

questions.sentence: We sat ___ the stage ___ our friends.
questions.completedSentence: We sat near the stage beside our friends.
questions.japanese: 舞台の近くで友人たちの隣に座った。

questions.sentence: The ball rolled ___ the chairs and ___ the desk.
questions.completedSentence: The ball rolled between the chairs and under the desk.
questions.japanese: ボールは椅子の間を転がり、机の下へ入った。
